theme.en: Custom Silicon Pushes Against Memory Limits
theme.zh: 定制芯片逼近内存边界

dek.en: OpenAI, Broadcom, and Qualcomm are pushing more AI compute into vertical silicon stacks, while Micron, SK hynix, and JCET show that memory and packaging capacity still set the pace. Export controls keep turning product roadmaps into regional variants rather than a single global lineup.
dek.zh: OpenAI、Broadcom和Qualcomm把更多AI计算推向垂直整合的芯片栈，而Micron、SK hynix和JCET的消息显示，存储与封装产能仍在决定节奏。出口管制继续把产品路线图切成区域化版本，而不是单一的全球产品线。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Broadcom and OpenAI unveil custom Jalapeno inference processor
title.zh: Broadcom与OpenAI发布定制Jalapeno推理处理器

summary.en: Broadcom and OpenAI unveiled Jalapeno, a custom inference ASIC described as a reticle-sized processor built in a nine-month development cycle. Tom's Hardware says it is OpenAI's first custom chip and is positioned around performance per watt for inference. The story matters because large model builders are moving more accelerator demand toward vertically controlled silicon rather than relying only on merchant GPUs.
summary.zh: Broadcom和OpenAI发布了Jalapeno定制推理ASIC，报道称这是一颗接近reticle尺寸、用九个月完成开发周期的处理器。Tom's Hardware称其为OpenAI的首款定制芯片，重点放在推理性能功耗比上。这件事的意义在于，大模型公司正把更多加速器需求推向自控的垂直芯片方案，而不只是采购通用GPU。

title.en: Qualcomm lays out Dragonfly data-center CPUs, AI accelerators, and HBC
title.zh: Qualcomm公布Dragonfly数据中心CPU、AI加速器与HBC

summary.en: Qualcomm used Investor Day 2026 to outline Dragonfly data-center announcements spanning CPUs, AI accelerators, and High Bandwidth Compute, its HBM alternative. ServeTheHome frames the portfolio as Qualcomm's attempt to compete for AI factory infrastructure, not just edge or mobile inference. The important point is that memory bandwidth, networking, and CPU attach are being sold as one platform story.
summary.zh: Qualcomm在2026年投资者日公布Dragonfly数据中心路线，覆盖CPU、AI加速器以及作为HBM替代思路的High Bandwidth Compute。ServeTheHome将这套组合视为Qualcomm进入AI factory基础设施市场的尝试，而不只是边缘或移动端推理。关键在于，内存带宽、网络与CPU配套被一起打包成平台叙事。

title.en: Hygon targets data centers with 128-core C86 CPU roadmap
title.zh: 海光以128核C86 CPU路线图瞄准数据中心

summary.en: Hygon presented new China-focused data-center CPUs and GPUs, led by a C86 CPU roadmap targeting 128 cores, 512 threads, and a reported 15% IPC gain. Wccftech frames the launch as part of China's effort to reduce reliance on foreign chips. It is a policy-sensitive compute story as much as a product story, because domestic server silicon is becoming a response to export constraints.
summary.zh: 海光展示了面向中国数据中心的新CPU和GPU路线，其中C86 CPU规划指向128核、512线程，并宣称IPC提升15%。Wccftech将其放在中国降低对海外芯片依赖的大背景下。它不仅是产品新闻，也是政策驱动的算力新闻，因为国产服务器芯片正在成为出口限制下的替代路径。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: JCET plans a new Shanghai plant for advanced chip packaging
title.zh: 长电科技计划在上海新建先进封装工厂

summary.en: China's JCET will build a new plant in Shanghai to expand advanced chip packaging capacity, the South China Morning Post reported. Advanced packaging is increasingly the constraint between foundry output and usable AI systems, especially as chiplets and high-bandwidth memory stacks become standard. The investment also adds local assembly depth to China's semiconductor supply chain.
summary.zh: 据South China Morning Post报道，中国长电科技将在上海建设新工厂，以扩大先进芯片封装产能。随着chiplet和高带宽存储堆栈成为主流，先进封装正在成为晶圆产出转化为可用AI系统之间的关键约束。这项投资也会增强中国半导体供应链在本地组装环节的厚度。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: SK hynix reportedly overtakes Samsung after 26 years
title.zh: SK hynix据称26年来首次超越Samsung

summary.en: Tech Times reports that SK hynix has dethroned Samsung after 26 years and is choosing near-term DDR5 profits over an aggressive HBM4 ramp. The framing highlights a real tension for memory makers: AI demand rewards HBM capacity, but server DRAM pricing can also absorb scarce leading-edge production. For customers, the balance affects how quickly HBM4 supply can broaden beyond early flagship platforms.
summary.zh: Tech Times报道称，SK hynix在26年后超越Samsung，并选择优先获取DDR5的近期利润，而不是全力加速HBM4爬坡。这个说法凸显了存储厂商的现实取舍：AI需求推高HBM价值，但服务器DRAM价格同样能消化稀缺的先进产能。对客户来说，这会影响HBM4供给从早期旗舰平台扩散到更广市场的速度。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: Europe scales 6-inch photonic chip production
title.zh: 欧洲推进6英寸光子芯片量产

summary.en: Interesting Engineering reports that Europe is scaling 6-inch photonic chip production toward mass manufacturing. Photonic chips matter for optical I/O, sensing, and data-center interconnects, but the sector has often been limited by manufacturability rather than lab demonstrations. A 6-inch production path is a useful signal if it can translate into yield, packaging, and process repeatability.
summary.zh: Interesting Engineering报道称，欧洲正在把6英寸光子芯片生产推向规模制造。光子芯片关系到optical I/O、传感和数据中心互连，但这一领域长期受限于可制造性，而不是缺少实验室演示。6英寸生产路径是一个有用信号，前提是它能继续转化为良率、封装和工艺重复性。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: Nvidia's Huang calls smuggled-parts data centers a dead end
title.zh: 黄仁勋称走私零部件数据中心是死路

summary.en: CNBC reports that Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang called black-market data centers built from smuggled Nvidia parts a dead end. The comment keeps export controls and compliance in the center of the AI infrastructure debate. It also signals Nvidia's need to separate legitimate regional sales channels from gray-market clusters that may be unreliable or unsupported.
summary.zh: CNBC报道称，Nvidia CEO黄仁勋把使用走私Nvidia零部件搭建的黑市数据中心称为死路。这个表态让出口管制和合规继续处在AI基础设施讨论的中心。它也显示Nvidia需要把合法区域销售渠道与可能缺乏可靠性和支持的灰色集群区分开。

title.en: Qualcomm plans China-specific data-center chip under US curbs
title.zh: Qualcomm计划按美国限制设计中国版数据中心芯片

summary.en: Nikkei Asia reports that Qualcomm plans to design a China-specific data-center chip to comply with US export controls. That is a practical sign of product bifurcation: accelerator vendors are building regional SKUs rather than shipping one global performance envelope. The trade-off is access to China demand at the cost of added validation, support, and roadmap complexity.
summary.zh: Nikkei Asia报道称，Qualcomm计划设计一款符合美国出口管制的中国专用数据中心芯片。这是产品分叉的实际信号：加速器厂商正在构建区域SKU，而不是交付单一全球性能边界。代价是在进入中国需求的同时，增加验证、支持和路线图复杂度。

title.en: US brings the Netherlands into Pax Silica chip alliance
title.zh: 美国将荷兰纳入Pax Silica芯片联盟

summary.en: Tom's Hardware reports that the US has secured the Netherlands for the Pax Silica Alliance, while tension remains over MATCH Act restrictions. The Netherlands is strategically important because lithography and semiconductor-tool supply chains run through Dutch capabilities. The alliance story shows Washington trying to harden friend-shored chip capacity without fully resolving subsidy and restriction disputes.
summary.zh: Tom's Hardware报道称，美国已让荷兰加入Pax Silica Alliance，但围绕MATCH Act限制仍存在紧张。荷兰具有战略重要性，因为光刻和半导体设备供应链离不开荷兰能力。这个联盟信号说明华盛顿正在强化友岸芯片产能，但补贴和限制规则的分歧尚未完全解决。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 财报与市场

title.en: Micron forecasts strong quarter on memory-chip demand
title.zh: Micron因存储芯片需求给出强劲季度展望

summary.en: The Korea Times reports that Micron forecast strong quarterly results as memory-chip demand rises. The read-through is that AI infrastructure demand is still tightening supply for HBM and advanced DRAM, even after a sharp run in memory names. For chip buyers, the message is that memory availability and pricing remain central constraints on AI server ramps.
summary.zh: The Korea Times报道称，随着存储芯片需求上升，Micron给出了强劲的季度业绩展望。其含义是，即使存储股已经大幅上涨，AI基础设施需求仍在收紧HBM和先进DRAM供给。对芯片买家来说，存储可获得性和价格仍是AI服务器爬坡的核心约束。

title.en: Cerebras stock tumbles after first post-IPO earnings report
title.zh: Cerebras上市后首份财报发布后股价下跌

summary.en: Barron's reports that Cerebras shares tumbled after the AI-chip company delivered its first quarterly financial report since going public. The reaction shows that public-market tolerance for accelerator challengers depends on execution, not only on AI demand. It also gives investors another benchmark for how non-GPU architectures are being valued after IPO.
summary.zh: Barron's报道称，AI芯片公司Cerebras发布上市后的首份季度财报后股价下跌。市场反应说明，公开市场对加速器挑战者的容忍度取决于执行，而不只是AI需求叙事。这也为投资者评估非GPU架构在IPO后的定价提供了另一个样本。

title.en: Challengers
title.zh: 挑战者

title.en: SambaNova reportedly seeks a $10 billion valuation
title.zh: SambaNova据称寻求100亿美元估值

summary.en: The Information reports that Intel-backed AI-chip firm SambaNova is set to nearly quintuple its valuation to $10 billion. The financing signal matters because challenger silicon companies still need large capital pools to support hardware, software, and customer deployment cycles. It also suggests investors remain willing to fund alternatives to Nvidia despite long sales cycles and uncertain utilization.
summary.zh: The Information报道称，Intel支持的AI芯片公司SambaNova估值可能接近翻五倍至100亿美元。这个融资信号重要，因为挑战者芯片公司仍需要大规模资本来支撑硬件、软件和客户部署周期。它也说明，即便销售周期长、利用率存在不确定性，投资者仍愿意押注Nvidia之外的替代方案。

theme.en: Memory Paths Shape AI System Design
theme.zh: 内存路径重塑AI系统设计

dek.en: This week's papers attack the same bottleneck from device, accelerator, interconnect, and serving layers: less data movement, more locality, and better scheduling. The strongest results pair hardware-aware algorithms with concrete power, bandwidth, or latency measurements.
dek.zh: 本周论文从器件、加速器、互连和服务系统层面处理同一个瓶颈：减少数据搬移、提高局部性并改进调度。最有分量的结果都把硬件感知算法与具体的功耗、带宽或延迟数据结合起来。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Multi-Mode Artificial Vision Neurons for High-Precision Image Recognition
title.zh: 用于高精度图像识别的多模式人工视觉神经元

papers.authors: X. Wu, Y. Liang, D. Liu, M. Lian, et al.

summary.en: This paper reports a reconfigurable artificial vision neuron using Ta2O5/PDVT-10-CsPbBr3 quantum dots to combine retina-like and cortex-like spiking in one optoelectronic device. Bias-free optical leaky-integrate-and-fire behavior lets the device stay quiet on static scenes and emit sparse events when intensity changes. The result targets lower bandwidth and energy for edge vision, where moving full image frames to processors is the bottleneck.
summary.zh: 这篇论文提出基于Ta2O5/PDVT-10-CsPbBr3量子点的可重构人工视觉神经元，在一个光电子器件中结合类视网膜和类皮层脉冲行为。其无偏置optical LIF响应可在静态场景下保持低活动度，并在光强变化时生成稀疏事件。结果指向低带宽、低能耗的边缘视觉，因为把完整图像帧搬到处理器才是主要瓶颈。

title.en: Polarization-Selective UV Photosynapse Devices With PdSe2/a-plane GaN
title.zh: 基于PdSe2/a-plane GaN的偏振选择性紫外光突触器件

papers.authors: T. Lin, L. Liu, X. Liu, C. Zhou, W. Wang

summary.en: The authors propose PdSe2/a-plane GaN heterostructures for polarization-selective UV photosynapse devices and use pre-selenization to raise PdSe2 anisotropy to a dichroic ratio of 16. The integrated device lifts the anisotropic photocurrent ratio from 1.6 to 10.7 and shows relaxation time up to 282 seconds. It is device-level progress for neuromorphic UV sensing, though manufacturability and long-term stability still need proof beyond the reported structures.
summary.zh: 作者提出用于偏振选择性紫外光突触器件的PdSe2/a-plane GaN异质结构，并通过预硒化把PdSe2各向异性提高到16的二色比。集成器件把各向异性光电流比从1.6提升到10.7，并显示最高282秒的弛豫时间。这是神经形态紫外传感的器件级进展，但可制造性和长期稳定性仍需要超出当前结构的验证。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: RISC-V Vectorized Softmax Acceleration for Edge Inference
title.zh: 面向边缘推理的RISC-V向量化Softmax加速

papers.authors: C.-F. Lai, P.-C. Liu, S.-H. Huang, H.-H. Chen

summary.en: This work introduces conditional online Softmax, a one-pass algorithm that fuses reduction and normalization to cut memory traffic while preserving numerical stability. A branch-free RISC-V Vector implementation improves performance by 7% over safe Softmax and 43% over the original online Softmax, while manual RVV vectorization beats GCC auto-vectorization by 2.9x. The result is directly relevant to attention and classifier heads on small edge processors.
summary.zh: 这项工作提出conditional online Softmax，用单次遍历融合归约和归一化，在保持数值稳定性的同时减少内存流量。其无分支RISC-V Vector实现比safe Softmax快7%，比原始online Softmax快43%，手写RVV向量化比GCC自动向量化快2.9倍。该结果直接面向小型边缘处理器上的attention和分类头。

title.en: When Proofs Meet Hardware: NTT Versus SumCheck in ZKP Systems
title.zh: 当证明遇到硬件：ZKP系统中的NTT与SumCheck比较

papers.authors: J. Mo, A. Daftardar, B. GaneshKumar, K. Guo, et al.

summary.en: The paper compares NTT- and SumCheck-based proving primitives for ZeroCheck under a unified hardware-system framework with the same SRAM and off-chip bandwidth budgets. It finds no universal winner: SumCheck tends to win for high-degree polynomials, while low-degree cases depend strongly on available memory. The value is a system-level map for ZKP accelerator designers who otherwise rely on asymptotic arguments or isolated kernels.
summary.zh: 论文在统一硬件系统框架下比较ZeroCheck中的NTT和SumCheck证明原语，并控制相同的片上SRAM与片外带宽预算。结果显示不存在通用赢家：高阶多项式通常更适合SumCheck，低阶场景则高度依赖可用内存。其价值在于为ZKP加速器设计者提供系统级地图，而不是只依赖渐进复杂度或孤立kernel。

title.en: All-Optical Signal Processor for Terabit-per-Second Equalization
title.zh: 用于Tbps实时均衡的全光信号处理器

papers.authors: B. Wang, Q. Xiao, T. Xu, L. Fan, et al.

summary.en: This Science paper demonstrates an integrated programmable optical signal processor that performs nonlinear, DSP-free real-time equalization before detection. The system equalizes eight WDM channels at 1.6 Tb/s aggregate throughput with less than 60 ps latency and tens of femtojoules per bit. If it can integrate cleanly with transceiver stacks, it points to lower-power optical links for large AI clusters.
summary.zh: 这篇Science论文展示了一种集成可编程光信号处理器，可在探测前执行非线性、无DSP的实时均衡。系统同时均衡8个WDM通道，总吞吐达到1.6 Tb/s，延迟低于60 ps，能耗为每bit数十fJ。如果能与收发器栈顺利集成，它将指向大型AI集群中更低功耗的光互连。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: Google TPUs From TPUv2 to Ironwood Across Five Generations
title.zh: Google TPU从TPUv2到Ironwood的五代演进

papers.authors: N. P. Jouppi, S. Lakshmanamurthy, C. Young, D. A. Patterson

summary.en: Google's IEEE Micro retrospective covers TPU v2 through Ironwood and argues that a stable architecture absorbed major workload shifts such as Transformers. Reported gains over eight years include 10x more HBM capacity and bandwidth per node, 100x higher peak node performance, and 3600x higher supercomputer performance. The paper is useful as a roadmap for accelerator resilience, optical circuit switching, built-in self-test, and hardware replay.
summary.zh: Google在IEEE Micro的回顾文章覆盖TPU v2到Ironwood，并认为稳定架构吸收了Transformer等重大工作负载变化。文中给出的八年提升包括单节点HBM容量和带宽提高10倍、节点峰值性能提高100倍、超级计算机级性能提高3600倍。论文对理解加速器韧性、光路交换、内建自测和硬件重放路线有参考价值。

title.en: NEURON-Fabric: CXL-Side Low-Bit Gradient Aggregation
title.zh: NEURON-Fabric：CXL侧低比特梯度聚合

papers.authors: Z. Wang, C. Huang, C.-H. Lung

summary.en: NEURON-Fabric puts low-bit gradient aggregation inside a CXL memory-controller path while preserving a 32-bit floating-point bypass. Cycle-level experiments report a five-cycle aggregation datapath and at most 1.67% exposed runtime overhead in a full LLC-miss regime, with the compute stage hidden under bandwidth pressure. The idea targets distributed LLM training bottlenecks, though the accuracy checks remain early compared with full-scale model training.
summary.zh: NEURON-Fabric把低比特梯度聚合放入CXL内存控制器路径，同时保留32位浮点旁路。周期级实验显示聚合数据通路为5个cycle，在完全LLC miss场景下最多暴露1.67%的运行时开销，并可在带宽压力下隐藏计算阶段。该思路瞄准分布式LLM训练瓶颈，但相较全规模模型训练，其精度验证仍属早期。

title.en: PyramidFFT for Scratchpad-Based AI Accelerators
title.zh: 面向scratchpad AI加速器的PyramidFFT

papers.authors: X. Zhao, R. Zhang, H. Jia, K. Li, et al.
papers.venue: ACM Transactions on Architecture and Code Optimization (TACO)

summary.en: PyramidFFT rearchitects FFT execution for AI accelerators with large scratchpad memories, using memory-aware nested networks, matrix-aligned butterfly layouts, and real-FFT compression. The paper reports up to an 8.2x efficiency improvement over a baseline that does not exploit the memory hierarchy. It is a reminder that AI accelerator blocks can be useful for memory-bound HPC kernels only when layout and locality are redesigned with the hardware.
summary.zh: PyramidFFT面向拥有大容量scratchpad memory的AI加速器重新设计FFT执行，结合内存感知nested network、矩阵对齐butterfly布局和real FFT压缩。论文报告相较未利用内存层级的baseline最高获得8.2倍效率提升。它提醒我们，AI加速器模块要服务内存受限HPC kernel，必须围绕硬件重新设计布局与局部性。

title.en: AI Systems & Algorithms
title.zh: AI系统与算法

title.en: Fast Vector Search With Binary Prefiltering and SIMD Rescoring
title.zh: 基于二进制预筛与SIMD重评分的快速向量检索

papers.authors: T. Simon, Y.-C. Chen, J.-J. Chen
papers.venue: ACM Transactions on Embedded Computing Systems

summary.en: This paper optimizes flat vector search with a two-step primitive: a bandwidth-efficient binary sketch prefilters candidates, then SIMD rescoring refines the ranking. On a 1.2 million-vector PC dataset it reports more than 120x speedup over a float32 baseline with NDCG@100 of 0.99; on Raspberry Pi 3 it cuts latency by 39x to 59x and energy by 41x. The result is relevant for edge RAG systems where memory bandwidth dominates query cost.
summary.zh: 这篇论文用两步原语优化flat vector search：先用带宽高效的二进制sketch预筛候选，再用SIMD重评分细化排序。在包含120万向量的PC数据集上，相比float32 baseline实现超过120倍加速且NDCG@100为0.99；在Raspberry Pi 3上延迟降低39到59倍，能耗降低41倍。该结果适用于内存带宽主导查询成本的边缘RAG系统。

title.en: Maestro Schedules LLM Multi-Agent Systems Across Clusters
title.zh: Maestro面向LLM多智能体系统进行跨集群调度

papers.authors: J. Wang, X. Zhou, X. Sun, Y. Zhang, et al.

summary.en: Maestro is a workload-aware scheduler for LLM multi-agent systems, where one user query can trigger an iterative chain of model calls with heavy-tailed decode costs. It predicts each stage's output length and memory demand, then combines hierarchical weight caching, elastic memory provisioning, and latency-aware cluster routing. The paper is useful because agent serving needs scheduling semantics beyond ordinary single-request queues.
summary.zh: Maestro是面向LLM多智能体系统的工作负载感知调度器，在这类系统中，一个用户查询可能触发一串迭代模型调用，并产生长尾decode成本。它预测每个阶段的输出长度和内存需求，再结合分层权重缓存、弹性内存配置和延迟感知的集群路由。论文的价值在于指出agent serving需要超出普通单请求队列的调度语义。
